chapter_title.en: Chapter 84 – The striving regarding a need of the Momin

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (114/ 9)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (114/ 9)
text: كَفَى بِالْمَرْءِ اعْتِمَاداً عَلَى أَخِيهِ أَنْ يُنْزِلَ بِهِ حَاجَتَهُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Jameel Bin Darraj,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘It suffices with the person as a reliance upon his brother, if he were to place his need with him’.
en.sarwar: 8. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al- Hassan ibn Ali from Jamil ibn Darraj from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “A believer’s asking help from his brother (in belief) is enough proof of the former’s trust in the latter.”
